# CivicOS National: Digital Infrastructure for a Smarter India
> A sovereign, government-grade platform designed to revolutionize civic reporting and resolution tracking for every citizen across the nation.

## Mission
To empower citizens by providing direct, real-time connectivity with government departments, municipal corporations, and urban planners through intelligent, data-driven infrastructure.

## Key Capabilities
- **AI-Powered Quick-Report**: Advanced natural language processing to automatically categorize, prioritize, and fast-track civic complaints.
- **Unified Citizen Dashboard**: A centralized hub for tracking complaint progress, historical data, and resolution performance.
- **Dynamic Spatial Mapping**: Real-time visualization of city-wide infrastructure status and incident hotspots for better urban management.
- **Sovereign Digital Infrastructure**: Built with high security and GIGW standards to protect national interests and citizen privacy.

## Primary Navigation
- [Home](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/) - Platform overview and AI reporting gateway.
- [Dashboard](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/dashboard) - Personalized citizen service portal.
- [Spatial Map](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/map) - Interactive national civic infrastructure map.
- [Report Issues](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/report) - Feedback and grievance reporting system.

## Performance and Accessibility
CivicOS is optimized for ultra-low latency, mobile-first responsiveness, and full compliance with Digital India accessibility guidelines.

## Technical Index
- [Sitemap](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/sitemap.xml) - Machine-readable index of all platform routes.
- [Robots](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/robots.txt) - Search engine crawler directives.
- [AEO Metadata](https://civic-os-five.vercel.app/) - Schema.org structured data for Answer Engine Optimization.
